message:
chore: clippy compliance, idiom cleanup, and error message clarity

Mechanical improvements across four files:

- tests/fabric_lab_integration.rs: add clippy::too_many_lines and
  clippy::struct_excessive_bools allows; replace .clone() with
  .clone_from() and modernize format strings

- tests/fabric_properties.rs: replace redundant closures with
  direct function references (NodeId::new); drop redundant .clone()
  where values can be moved; refactor loop into iterator chain;
  replace modulo check with .is_multiple_of(2)

- benches/fabric_bench.rs: extract inline repair-count calculation
  into named helper total_symbols_with_repair_overhead; update
  SubjectPattern::new calls to pass owned String directly

- src/net/quic/endpoint.rs: reword TLS configuration error message
  for grammatical clarity and to distinguish unconditional from
  conditional requirements

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
